Home → Discography → Art of War: World War III

Art of War: World War III

2013 · Seven Arts Music / BTNH Worldwide

#28 Billboard R&B/Hip-Hop

The ninth studio album by Bone Thugs-N-Harmony and their sequel to the legendary quadruple-platinum Art of War. Features all five original members despite internal conflict. Krayzie and Wish only appear via previously unreleased tracks recorded for Uni5. Produced primarily by DJ U-Neek.

"High enough to be social, zone out wit' a glass of Bourbon, I'm pearling, swerving on the freeway, purposely, close curtain."

— Walk This Way
01 WWIII (Introduction) produced by DJ U-Neek ▷
02 Top Notch produced by DJ U-Neek & David Michery ▷
03 Murda on U produced by Desmond "DSP" Powell feat. Don Jagwarr ▷
04 Born in the Ghetto produced by Bizzy Bone feat. Big B ▷
05 Bone produced by DJ U-Neek feat. Tanieya Washington ▷
06 Bring It Back produced by DJ U-Neek ▷
07 Approach 2 Danger produced by DJ U-Neek ▷
08 Bitch Iz a Bitch produced by DJ U-Neek ▷
09 It's a Bone Thang produced by DJ U-Neek ▷
10 100-K produced by Kenny McCloud ▷
11 Deep End produced by Kenny McCloud feat. Porcha ▷
12 Back in tha Dayz produced by DJ U-Neek feat. Tanieya Weathington ▷
13 Walk This Way produced by R'Kitek feat. Big B ▷
14 Rapella (Interlude) produced by Kenny McCloud feat. Porcha & Gray The Beatboxer ▷
15 Swagged Out produced by DJ U-Neek ▷
16 It Will Be Alright produced by DJ U-Neek feat. Porcha ▷
17 In Memory of Eazy produced by DJ U-Neek feat. Bruce-E-Bee & Phaedra ▷
